description: Use this API to determine the buffer size needed to hold the comments for the specified group. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr, length = scenariogrouplengthcomments(sgroup)

parameters.name: sgroup
parameters.description: Name of the group whose comment length is to be returned. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: length
return_values.description: Length of the comment string for the specified group. (output).
